title: hieracium atratum subsp. protensum
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. protensum is a subspecies of the Hieracium atratum plant, commonly known as the purple hawk's-beard, which is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote digestive health, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Hieracium atratum subsp. protensum typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
